name: Suhas Subramanyam
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $112,035 for Suhas Subramanyam in U.S. House, VA-10. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
